hero.mainTitle: Best Pure Veg Homestay in Dapoli
hero.subTitle: Authentic Family Experience
hero.description: Pure vegetarian homestay in Dapoli — with real village experience

owner.name: Dr. Prashant Paranjpe
owner.p1: Amrapali Homestay, located in Dapoli taluka of Konkan, is an ideal destination for nature lovers. At our homestay, you get an experience of real village life - fresh air, lush green trees, chirping birds and homemade pure vegetarian food.
owner.p2: Introduction to eco-friendly lifestyle and nature reading. A unique blend of literature, environment and tourism. Amrapali Homestay is the best place to spend a pleasant holiday with family and relax in the company of nature.

features.title: Pure Nature
features.desc: Peaceful environment surrounded by lush green trees

features.title: Family Atmosphere
features.desc: Safe and enjoyable for all age groups

descriptions.family-cottage-fan: This cottage is perfect for families. It has a fan, attached bathroom and a beautiful garden view.
descriptions.family-cottage-ac: This AC cottage is comfortable even in summer. Comes with a private entry and modern amenities.
descriptions.ac-room: Excellent AC room for 1 to 3 people. Comfortable living with all modern amenities.
descriptions.non-ac-room: Best stay option in budget. Comfortable room for 2 people.
descriptions.joint-cottage: Special cottage for large groups. Enough space for 8 people and all facilities.
descriptions.couple-cottage: Ideal cottage for couples. Private, comfortable and clean.

list.title: Campfire
list.desc: Enjoy campfire with family in the evening

list.title: Side Scenes
list.desc: Arrangement of car or auto for Dapoli side scenes on request

list.title: Pickup/Drop
list.desc: Pickup and drop from Dapoli bus station and Khed railway station on request.

list.title: Tourist Spots Visit
list.desc: Information about all tourist spots in Dapoli taluka available.

list.name: Sagar Oak, Pune.
list.text: On Tuesday afternoon, four of us arrived at "Amrapali Homestay" in Dapoli from Khed. The atmosphere there was very pure. All their arrangements were made with a practical view of not harming nature in any way. Asmita and Prashant Paranjpe themselves were at our service with the help of their assistant Pramod. It should be mentioned here that Prashant was awarded an honorary doctorate by the University of Colombo, Sri Lanka just two months ago for his work in nature conservation. The homemade delicious food prepared by Asmita was a treat.

list.name: Mr. Rajesh Patil
list.text: We stayed with family in Amrapali Homestay. Very quiet atmosphere, delicious food and very loving behavior of the owners. Will definitely come again!

list.name: Mrs. Anita Deshmukh
list.text: Best homestay in Dapoli! Children loved it very much. The bullock cart ride and campfire experience was unforgettable.

list.name: Mr. Suhas Joshi
list.text: Amazing taste of pure vegetarian food. Great place for relaxation in the company of nature. Recommend to everyone.
